rationale.R1.2: The analysis identifies and addresses inconsistencies in the argument chain, proposing minimal repairs to the multiplicative-σ claim and the novelty against SARAH/SPIDER/SpiderBoost.
rationale.RX.1: The output flags uncertainty for one clearly out-of-reach claim: the empirical Likert-benchmark performance is not explained by the convergence proof.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed J*(d).
rationale.RX.4: The output introduces no new errors, fabrications, or harmful content but has one minor regression: it overstates the robustness of AdaSpec to label noise.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason.
